item.title: Merge pull request #698 from anthropics/cj-ant/sentry-managed-agent
item.description: feat(managed_agents): add Sentry triage scheduled agent example

item.title: feat(managed_agents): add Sentry triage scheduled agent example
item.description: Folder example that provisions a Claude Managed Agent with a sentry-cli vault credential, schedules it with the deployments API, and writes a triage report each run. Bumps anthropic to >=0.109.0 for deployments support.

item.title: Merge pull request #696 from anthropics/paulchen-go/async-multi-agent-orchestration
item.description: Add async multi-agent orchestration cookbook

item.title: Merge pull request #695 from anthropics/anthropic/alexander/fable-5-classifier-billing-cookbook
item.description: Fable 5 classifier and billing cookbook

item.title: Adjust directory
Classifier cookbook, author updates, registry updates
Add async multi-agent orchestration cookbook
item.description: Two async multi-agent patterns on the Messages API: a fixed N-agent team with peer messaging through a shared hub, and a lead agent that spawns, monitors, and dismisses async subagents.

item.title: Merge pull request #678 from anthropics/kevintang/agent-sdk-hosting-followup
item.description: hosting: lint fixes + address #677 review comments

item.title: hosting: address #677 review comments
item.description: - server.py, gateway/main.py: note that _limit_body_size only checks Content-Length; chunked bodies pass through (review #1) - gateway/main.py: strip token:tenant pairs and skip malformed entries when parsing GATEWAY_TENANTS; log loaded count (review #2) - requirements.txt, server.py _remember,

item.title: chore(hosting): ruff format + lint fixes
Merge pull request #677 from anthropics/kevintang/agent-sdk-hosting-public
item.description: Agent SDK cookbook 07: Hosting your agent (Docker / Modal / Kubernetes)

item.title: feat(claude_agent_sdk): add hosting cookbook — Docker, Modal, and Kubernetes tiers
ci: migrate claude-code-action workflows to Workload Identity Federation (#662)
item.description: Replaces the static ANTHROPIC_API_KEY repo secret with Workload Identity Federation across the 6 workflows that invoke claude-code-action: the action exchanges this job's GitHub OIDC token for a short-lived access token. The federation rule is bound to this repository (repository_id-pinned). - Adds

item.title: Merge pull request #601 from anthropics/devsec/pin-actions
item.description: Pin GitHub Actions to commit SHAs

item.title: Merge pull request #602 from anthropics/devsec/pin-pre-commit
item.description: Pin pre-commit hooks to commit SHAs

item.title: Merge pull request #643 from anthropics/rlm/scrub-cma-notebooks
item.description: refactor(self_hosted_sandboxes): rename private-sandbox → self-hosted-sandbox

item.title: refactor(self_hosted_sandboxes): rename private-sandbox → self-hosted-sandbox in artifacts and titles
item.description: Align all deploy artifact names and README titles with the self_hosted language used in the directory/feature name. - README H1s (6): 'CMA Private Sandboxes' → 'Self-Hosted Sandboxes' - wrangler.toml names (cf, cf-worker) - package.json names (cf, cf-worker, vercel) - vercel runner package name in

item.title: Merge pull request #640 from anthropics/rlm/private-sandbox-updates
item.description: feat(managed_agents): sandbox worker templates

item.title: refactor(self_hosted_sandboxes): use published SDK releases; fix worker API usage
item.description: Installs: - ant CLI from GitHub releases (v1.9.0 tarball) instead of pinned prerelease build URLs; drop the unzip step in the Dockerfiles. - Python / TypeScript SDKs from PyPI / npm (anthropic, @anthropic-ai/sdk ^0.97.0) instead of prerelease build URLs. - Drop the committed package-lock.json fi

item.title: fix(self_hosted_sandboxes): address review — scrub staging/internal refs, tighten exception handling
item.description: - wrangler.toml (cf, cf-worker): default ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL to prod; replace real env_01… ids with placeholders + guidance comment - docs/usage-guide.md: replace real env ids with env_01... placeholders - modal/daytona webhook: catch (WebhookVerificationError, KeyError) instead of bare Exception

item.title: refactor(self_hosted_sandboxes): drop tool demos, rename privatesandbox* → self_hosted_sandbox*
item.description: - Remove browseruse/, cloudrepl/, livepage/ (custom-tool demos, out of scope) - Rename privatesandbox-* → self_hosted_sandbox-* for all six providers - Rewrite top-level README around the self-hosted sandbox contract - Fix cross-references in sub-READMEs, daytona_webhook.py, modal docstring - Repoin

item.title: feat(managed_agents): self-hosted sandbox worker templates
item.description: Reference implementations for running CMA sessions against self-hosted execution sandboxes via the session webhook + tool_result pattern. Includes: - privatesandbox-{cf,cf-worker,docker,daytona,modal,vercel}: private code-execution sandboxes on various compute providers - cloudrepl: QuickJS-WASM

item.title: Merge pull request #614 from anthropics/lance/managed-agents-slack
item.description: feat(managed_agents): Slack stateless webhook bridge template

item.title: Merge pull request #607 from anthropics/lance/managed-agents-linear
item.description: feat(managed_agents): Linear stateless webhook bridge template

item.title: Merge pull request #617 from anthropics/lance/managed-agents-cma-mcp
item.description: feat(managed_agents): CMA Sessions API as an MCP server (stdio + HTTP)

item.title: feat(managed_agents): Linear stateless webhook bridge template
item.description: Minimal TypeScript/Bun bridge connecting Linear's Agent Platform to Managed Agents via CMA outbound webhooks — no held SSE streams, no session-map DB (session.metadata carries linear_session_id + org_id). - setup/create-agent.ts: one-time agent + environment (claude-opus-4-7) - src/agent.ts: Linear

item.title: feat(managed_agents): CMA Sessions API as an MCP server (stdio + HTTP)
item.description: Thin MCP server wrapping Managed Agents sessions so Claude Desktop or claude.ai can drive hosted CMA agents via tool calls. DIY bridge until 'publish agent to claude.ai' is first-class. 9 tools in shared src/tools.ts — 8 are 1:1 endpoint wrappers; wait_for_idle is the SSE→request/response shim. Two

item.title: Merge pull request #606 from anthropics/mnowicki/cma-category-tag
item.description: feat(registry): retag managed_agents notebooks with Claude Managed Agents category

item.title: feat(schema): add Claude Managed Agents to registry category enum
feat(registry): retag managed_agents notebooks with Claude Managed Agents category
Merge pull request #600 from anthropics/mnowicki/managed-agents-render-fixes
fix(managed_agents): render outputs on docs site, retitle multiagent
item.description: - Retitle CMA_coordinate_specialist_team to "Multiagent: coordinate a specialist team" to match the Feature: pattern of sibling tutorials - Lowercase the Outcomes title body ("Outcomes: agents that verify their own work") to keep both Feature: titles on the same convention - Replace display(Mark

item.title: Merge pull request #599 from anthropics/mnowicki/managed-agents-multiagent-outcomes
item.description: feat(managed_agents): add multiagent and outcomes cookbooks

item.title: feat(managed_agents): add multiagent and outcomes cookbooks
item.description: - CMA_coordinate_specialist_team.ipynb: heterogeneous team via the multiagent coordinator config — coordinator runs three specialists with scoped toolsets to assemble a sales proposal - CMA_verify_with_outcome_grader.ipynb: grade-and-revise loop with Outcomes — writer drafts a cited brief, gra

item.title: feat(claude_agent_sdk): add vulnerability detection agent cookbook (#595)
item.description: * feat(claude_agent_sdk): add vulnerability detection agent cookbook 06_The_vulnerability_detection_agent.ipynb runs threat-model -> find -> triage -> report on a self-contained 45-line canary C target using claude-agent-sdk: ClaudeSDKClient for the multi-turn bootstrap-then- interview threat model

item.title: Merge pull request #573 from anthropics/claude/copy-memory-cookbook-pr-ZRx6N
item.description: feat(managed_agents): add Managed Agents Memory Cookbook

item.title: fix(managed_agents): round 5 of memory cookbook review feedback
item.description: - Simplify status_idle handler to a single unconditional break - Document run_turn return value in the docstring - Restore inline 'Optional: run before cleanup' hint in the seeding cell - Add catalog store cleanup reminder to the combine-stores snippet - Tighten registry description and intro phrasi

item.title: fix(managed_agents): address remaining memory cookbook review items
item.description: - Add wait_for_idle_status calls before session archive in cleanup - Break out of run_turn on any status_idle, not just end_turn - Guard event.input against None in tool_use handler - Move seeding-order warning to a markdown Note callout - Add %pip install cell for minimum SDK version - Link to sibl

item.title: fix(managed_agents): pin agent version in combine-stores snippet too
item.description: The illustrative markdown snippet under "Combine per-customer and shared stores" still passed agent=agent.id while the runnable cells were already using the pinned dict form. Align the snippet so readers copying the production pattern get the same version-pinned shape. https://claude.ai/code/sessio

item.title: fix(managed_agents): pin agent version on sessions.create in memory cookbook
item.description: Pass agent={"type": "agent", "id": agent.id, "version": agent.version} instead of the bare agent.id, matching every other notebook in the managed_agents series. https://claude.ai/code/session_01VkfVPdiJTWVh6Vj5owqRXH

item.title: fix(managed_agents): round 3 of memory cookbook review feedback
item.description: - run_turn: handle session.status_terminated and call wait_for_idle_status before returning, mirroring utilities.stream_until_end_turn; drop the now-redundant wait_for_idle_status calls from the cleanup cell - environments.create: pass an explicit cloud/limited config - agent_toolset_20260401:

item.title: fix(managed_agents): align memory cookbook with CMA series conventions
item.description: - Guard the session.status_idle break on stop_reason.type == "end_turn" so the pattern is safe to copy into custom-tool agents - Import wait_for_idle_status from utilities and call it before each sessions.archive() to absorb the SSE-vs-status race - Use environments.archive instead of environmen

item.title: docs(managed_agents): address review feedback on memory cookbook
item.description: - Prefer uv add over pip in the prerequisites - Clarify that the agent_toolset_20260401 type string identifies the toolset, not a model, and does not need bumping - Drop unused reply variable from the second run_turn call Intentionally skip the dotenv suggestion: the other managed_agents notebook

item.title: feat(managed_agents): add memory store cookbook
item.description: A guided tutorial showing how to give a Managed Agent a memory store so it learns and recalls a customer's shopping preferences across separate sessions. Covers store creation, the resources attachment with per-attachment instructions, inspecting and seeding memories from your own application, and c
